name: City of Carlyle Tennis Courts
description: Come play pickleball at City of Carlyle Tennis Courts in Carlyle, IL! There are 4 outdoor asphalt courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts cannot be reserved. The courts are free. Amenities include restrooms, water, and lights.
hours: M-F 7:30am - 4pm Send a Message Questions About The City? name: New Baden City Park
description: New Baden City Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in New Baden, IL. There are 2 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. You can’t reserve the courts. The courts are free.
hours: Monday - Friday: 8:30 am to 4:00 pm © Copyright 2026 | Website by TechKnow Solutions, Inc. | Accessibility Statement We use cookies to ensure that we give you the best experience on our website. If you continue to use this site we will assume that you are happy with it. Ok

name: St. Mary's Center school gym
description: St. Mary's gym is available for play on Weekdays, except federal holidays and Catholic Holy Days of Obligation.
